MOTION And For Judgment On The Pleadings As To Answer Of Deft
Off Calendar Mar-28-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: James Brandan Kraus, Esq., LAW OFFICES OF ANDREW M. ZACKS, 415-956-8100, appeared on behalf of plaintiff and moving partyAndrea Boardman. John P. Cogger, Esq. LAW OFFICES OF LARRY D. LANGLEY, 415-732-4150, appeared on behalf defendant and opposing party Drad Drian.

After argument the revised tentative was adopted: Plaintiff Andrea Boardman's Motion for judgment on the pleadings as to answer of defendant: Defendant given 30 days leave to amend the answer as to defenses 1, 3, 8 through 14 and denied as to affirmative defense 4. Judgment on pleading GRANTED without leave to amend answer as to defenses 2, 9, and 15. (JJM-CL)
